posts.title: The Summit at Golden Hour
posts.bodyText: We started the ascent at 3am to catch the light. Worth every step.

photos.alt: Rocky trail leading up the ridge

posts.title: Mist Rolling Through the Pines
posts.bodyText: Dense pine forest with morning fog — the kind of quiet that feels earned.

photos.alt: Dense pine forest with morning fog
Sunlight filtering through tall pine trees

posts.title: High Tide at Crescent Beach
posts.bodyText: Turquoise waves, salt air, and nobody else on the sand at 6am.

photos.alt: Turquoise ocean waves crashing on shore
Empty beach at early morning low light

posts.title: Downtown Lights After Midnight
posts.bodyText: City skyline reflected in the river. The stillness after last call is something else.

photos.alt: City skyline reflected in a river at night
Neon signs blurring in a rain-slicked street

posts.title: Sahara at Midday
posts.bodyText: Red sand dunes stretching to the horizon. The heat was surreal.

photos.alt: Red sand dunes stretching to the horizon
Camel tracks cutting across a flat sand plain

posts.title: Hidden Falls Deep in the Rainforest
posts.bodyText: Two hours off-trail to find it. A waterfall nobody had named yet.

photos.alt: Tall waterfall cascading into a jungle pool
Dense green canopy with shafts of light breaking through
